LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED, ABM SERVICES, INC. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS ABM JANITORIAL SERVICES - NORTHERN CALIFORNIA), AND ABM JANITORIAL SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE PER CCP 397(C) IS GRANTED. UNDER JUNEAU, A PARTY OPPOSING A TRANSFER OF VENUE MOTION MUST PROVIDE A DECLARATION SHOWING THE 5 ELEMENTS TO SHOW WHY A CHANGE OF VENUE WOULD BE IMPROPER. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DO SO. MOREOVER, EVEN IF, AS PLAINTIFF SUGGESTS, DEFENDANTS WERE REQUIRED TO MAKE A HEIGHTENED SHOWING BY PROVIDING A DECLARATION SUPPORTING GROUNDS FOR THE MOTION, DEFENDANT HERE HAS DONE SO. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO FRESNO COUNTY

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Transfer Of Venue [Ccp 397(C)]
Off Calendar Jun-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED, ABM SERVICES, INC. (erroneously sued as ABM JANITORIAL SERVICES - NORTHERN CALIFORNIA), and ABM JANITORIAL SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE CCP SECTION 397(c).

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE PER CCP 397(C) IS GRANTED. UNDER JUNEAU, A PARTY OPPOSING A TRANSFER OF VENUE MOTION MUST PROVIDE A DECLARATION SHOWING THE 5 ELEMENTS TO SHOW WHY A CHANGE OF VENUE WOULD BE IMPROPER. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DO SO. MOREOVER, EVEN IF, AS PLAINTIFF SUGGESTS, DEFENDANTS WERE REQUIRED TO MAKE A HEIGHTENED SHOWING BY PROVIDING A DECLARATION SUPPORTING GROUNDS FOR THE MOTION, DEFENDANT HERE HAS DONE SO. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
